summary: A three-layer weighted recommendation system with pseudo-random sampling that balances personalization and diversity through dynamic event weighting and seeded PRNG for reproducibility.

description.problem_solved: Balances personalization and diversity in recommendation systems by combining relevance scoring (60%), exploration weights (30%), and time-decay factors (10%) with deterministic pseudo-random sampling.
description.key_innovation: Dynamic weight adjustment based on user behavior patterns and session context, using seeded PRNG for reproducible randomness that enables A/B testing and debugging while maintaining the benefits of exploration.

capabilities.name: dynamic_weight_calculation
capabilities.description: Calculates three-layer weights (relevance, exploration, time-decay) in real-time based on user profile and session context

capabilities.name: seeded_prng_sampling
capabilities.description: Deterministic pseudo-random sampling using user + context + time-granularity as seed for reproducibility

capabilities.name: adaptive_exploration
capabilities.description: Automatically adjusts exploration weight based on user's exploration score and churn risk

capabilities.name: time_decay_management
capabilities.description: Reduces weight for recently seen items to prevent recommendation fatigue

evolution_history.changes: Initial release - three-layer weighted system with seeded PRNG for e-commerce recommendations
